title: Kevin Thomsen

'''Kevin Thomsen''' is a [[Wikipedia:Film producer|producer]] and [[Wikipedia:Film director|director]] who has produced and directed numerous ''Star Wars'' audio dramas and audiobooks. 

Thomsen's first work for the ''[[Star Wars]]'' franchise and second job working with audiobooks<ref name="TheInterestingPodcast Ep 89" /> was directing the [[1995]] [[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|audio drama adaptation]] of the  comics [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Knights of the Old Republic|''Tales of the Jedi: Knights of the Old Republic'']] and [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising|''Tales of the Jedi: The Freedon Nadd Uprising'']] by [[Tom Veitch]].<ref name="Tales of the Jedi">[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]</ref>

Thomsen went on to produce and direct the abridged audiobooks for the novelizations of the [[original trilogy]] which despite being recorded after, they were released before the ''Tales of the Jedi'' adaptions. Thomsen later began working with [[Random House]] where they worked on over 150 ''Star Wars'' audiobooks.<ref name="TheInterestingPodcast Ep 89" />
